title: Route CheckoutSettlement / ServiceTask / BlockerEngine active or pilot back to legacy
steps: Set SliceCutoverState.runtime_mode to rollback for CheckoutSettlement, ServiceTask, and BlockerEngine.
Disable checkout/service/blocker feature flags or narrow them to zero percent.
Route new checkout/service/blocker actions through the legacy compatibility path.
Keep all already-written DomainEvent, WorkItem, blocker, and resource release facts append-only.
Create manual resolution WorkItems for open blockers that cannot be automatically resolved after rollback.
validation_steps: Run api-boundary-check and confirm no /api/checkout/close endpoint exists.
Run invariant-runner for MR-08 P0 invariants.
Confirm ServiceTask does not directly write BedStatus.
Confirm CheckoutSettlement does not directly write DepositEntry.
Confirm Manager Lite still shows timeline, blockers, overdue WorkItems, and closure checks.
